studyName: NHLBI TOPMed: Outcome Modifying Genes in Sickle Cell Disease (OMG)

tables.description: This subject phenotype table includes subject's sex, age, weight, height, systolic and diastolic blood pressure, hemoglobin diagnosis, hydroxyurea use, pre-hydroxyurea levels and current levels for hemoglobin, hematocrit, red blood cells, white blood cells, platelets, mean corpuscular volume, mean corpuscular hemoglobin and concentrations, and reticulocytes.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID

variables.description: Age

variables.description: Diastolic blood pressure

variables.name: bp_systol
variables.description: Systolic blood pressure

variables.name: c_hct_ave
variables.description: Current hematocrit - average of up to 3 baseline values; patient had not been transfused for 3 months prior

variables.description: Current hemoglobin level - average of up to 3 baseline values; patient had not been transfused for 3 months prior

variables.name: c_mcv_ave
variables.description: Current mean corpuscular volume - average of up to 3 baseline values; patient had not been transfused for 3 months prior

variables.description: Current platelet count - average of up to 3 baseline values; patient had not been transfused for 3 months prior

variables.description: Current red blood cell count - average of up to 3 baseline values; patient had not been transfused for 3 months prior

variables.description: Current reticulocyte percentage - average of up to 3 baseline values; patient had not been transfused for 3 months prior

variables.name: c_wbc_ave
variables.description: Current white blood cell count - average of up to 3 baseline values; patient had not been transfused for 3 months prior

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, sequencing center, funding source, TOPMed phase, study name, and project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: Funding_Source
variables.description: Project funding source

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: Study_Name
variables.description: TOPMed-assigned short study name (1:1 with TOPMed phs number)

variables.name: TOPMed_Phase
variables.description: TOPMed Phase

variables.name: TOPMed_Project
variables.description: TOPMed Project that funded sequencing

tables.description: The subject consent data table contains subject IDs and consent group information.

variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
